name: Code Llama 34B Python
note: Python-specialized Code Llama 34B, further trained on 100B Python tokens; HumanEval 53.7%, MBPP 56.2%.

results.notes: pass@1, Code Llama - Python 34B; also cited in Meta's official blog

25-shot acc_norm (harness|arc:challenge|25: acc_norm=0.50427), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (old) independent eval run of codellama/CodeLlama-34b-Python-hf -- fetched the raw results JSON directly. Not previously tracked (file only had HumanEval/MBPP from Meta's own paper).
10-shot acc_norm (harness|hellaswag|10: acc_norm=0.76359), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (old) independent eval run, raw results JSON.
5-shot acc averaged across all 57 MMLU subject subtasks (hendrycksTest-*, computed directly from the raw results JSON: mean acc = 0.49108), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (old) independent eval run.

MC2 score (harness|truthfulqa:mc|0: mc2=0.41373), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (old) independent eval run, matching this corpus's established convention of using MC2 for Open-LLM-Leaderboard-sourced TruthfulQA rows.
5-shot acc (harness|winogrande|5: acc=0.71902), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (old) independent eval run, raw results JSON.
5-shot acc (harness|gsm8k|5: acc=0.32297), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (old) independent eval run, raw results JSON.

verificationNotes: Confirmed release 2023-08-24 and license. Directly fetched arxiv.org/html/2308.12950v3 Table 2: HumanEval 53.7 / MBPP 56.2 for Code Llama - Python 34B confirmed exactly; also consistent with the paper's original (pre-70B) abstract headline of 'up to 53% and 55%' on HumanEval/MBPP, which referred to this exact model before the 70B variant was added in a later paper revision.
